# workflow-injection-whitelist.txt
#
# Grandfathered pre-existing ${{ inputs.* }} usages in run: blocks.
# These were present before validate-workflow-injection.sh was introduced (issue #100).
#
# Format: relative/path/to/file:lineno   # optional comment
#
# To suppress a NEW finding: add the entry here ONLY when the pattern is
# provably safe or the risk is accepted.  Prefer the safe pattern instead:
# assign to env:, reference as $VAR in run:.

# common-check-and-register-release.yml — artifact-pattern used as a path template
.github/workflows/common-check-and-register-release.yml:40

# common-java-gradle-build.yml — flow-type echoed in an error message (diagnostic only)
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-build.yml:45

# common-java-gradle-quality-gates.yml — Gradle command passed directly as run value
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-quality-gates.yml:89
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-quality-gates.yml:112

# common-java-gradle-release.yml — diagnostic echo and env writes (pre-existing)
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-release.yml:71
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-release.yml:96
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-release.yml:97
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-release.yml:100
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-release.yml:228
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-release.yml:241

# common-java-gradle-security-reports.yml — dependency-check command passed as run value
.github/workflows/common-java-gradle-security-reports.yml:137

# common-java-maven-build.yml — mvn-parameters appended to Maven command
.github/workflows/common-java-maven-build.yml:33

# common-java-maven-release.yml — diagnostic echo and env writes (pre-existing)
.github/workflows/common-java-maven-release.yml:63
.github/workflows/common-java-maven-release.yml:88
.github/workflows/common-java-maven-release.yml:89
.github/workflows/common-java-maven-release.yml:92
.github/workflows/common-java-maven-release.yml:194

# common-py-2-3-build-deploy.yml — process_env echoed for diagnostics
.github/workflows/common-py-2-3-build-deploy.yml:19
.github/workflows/common-py-2-3-build-deploy.yml:51

# common-py-build-deploy.yml — process_env echoed for diagnostics
.github/workflows/common-py-build-deploy.yml:24
.github/workflows/common-py-build-deploy.yml:64

# common-register-release.yml — repository name/release version in curl payload
.github/workflows/common-register-release.yml:25
.github/workflows/common-register-release.yml:35
